reviews.text:
You know when your body is not properly functioning. You see various professionals, explaining your symptoms, and remain hopeful they will listen and prescribe for optimal wellness, right?

If you want a certified medical practitioner who will listen, ask questions, dig deep to find the root cause of your symptoms, prescribe medication, supplementation, and lifestyle strategies -- certified Functional Medicine and Nurse Practitioner, Kristin Brown, is excellent. She has shed light on health issues I was struggling with that no traditional doctor or naturopath has even attempted to uncover.

I started seeing Kristin in December of 2018 with a goal to eliminate inflammation and ideally rid myself of autoimmune problems. While it’s only been six months, I feel the best I have in years and my labs show improvements across the board. Labs don’t lie.

With Kristin’s guidance and team approach to wellness, she advised and referred me to a nutritionist. I would have never thought of it, as I consider myself well educated on the subject. Kristin is excellent at explaining the “why” of her advice and strategies. Taking time with me, as needed, and hearing my needs/goals has been a refreshing experience.

After years of frustrating doctor appointments with no long-term healing, I am so happy to be on the path to optimal wellness and feeling the best I have in a very long time.

Build your "Wellness Team" and include Kristin Brown of Altheda Health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ1yFAvWJtkFQRx8O1BA0bbqk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psNU56SnBYMUZEY1VabVpWUnFiSFo0YUhjelMxRRAB
reviews.text:
I was recommended to this skin treatment clinic by several friends who had heard they had “the most experience” in town, so I came in with high expectations. I’ve had several treatments here, and unfortunately, each one came with issues. My lip filler results were uneven and didn’t look right, which was disappointing and stressful. After my Ultherapy session, I experienced a pretty strong headache that I wasn’t expecting. During my Thermage treatment, there were several machine malfunctions that interrupted the session and made the whole experience feel disorganized.
The last straw for me was the Rejuran skin booster. The syringes were leaking fluid during the procedure, and the esthetician performing it was new. I understand everyone needs to learn, but between the leakage, the technique, and the overall lack of confidence I felt from the process, I realized this clinic just isn’t the right place for me.

Although the clinic advertises having extremely experienced master estheticians, the estheticians I interacted with did not seem as knowledgeable or skilled as I expected especially considering the significantly higher cost compared to other clinics offering the same treatments. Based on the results I saw and the overall experience, I genuinely feel I could go somewhere with more consistent experience and reliability, and often at a lower cost.

If you absolutely need a doctor on-site for medical evaluation or diagnosis, then yes, this clinic might make sense. However, in my personal experience, the doctor seemed more focused on recommending treatments than on understanding what I actually needed. I also felt uncomfortable during one interaction where the doctor overheard a conversation I was having with the front desk and abruptly chimed in from his office about booking a treatment I wasn’t even sure I wanted. He offered me lower cost than advertised because I mentioned I’m booking it with a different clinic later because it’s cheaper. The whole situation felt unprofessional and high-pressure.

Another thing that bothered me was the strong emphasis on generating positive reviews. Several clients were encouraged to write “great reviews” in exchange for discounts, and some were even told to use ChatGPT to make it easier. To me, this raises questions about how reflective those glowing ratings truly are.

I’m sharing this because I would have appreciated hearing honest feedback before committing to multiple treatments. I hope it helps someone else make a more informed decision.

reviews.text: I came to Dr Lilly Chang due to extreme pain in left shoulder. Later found out by an MRI that I had a severely torn rotator cuff, dislocated bicep muscle that needed to be cut and relocated in bone by pin. I also had scar tissue in joint and 2 bone spurs cleaned out. A week before my surgery, I saw Dr. chang. and was on FSM. It immediately dulled pain. I used it 20 hrs a day. 10 hrs longer than prescribed. It was uncomfortable the first 2 days. But then I could tell when the machine went off. The pain would begin to radiate and I couldn’t wait to start over. After surgery I was not able to get it on till day 2 because of the bandage locations. Once I did it was immediate pain relief and never removed it till my first Physical Therapy apt. The therapist did an initial overview of my pain and then stared testing my range of motion. He was completely amazed!! He had never seen my range of motion after such an extensive surgery 1 week out before. He was very impressed and interested in the multi current machine. I see my orthopedic surgeon tomorrow and can’t wait to share the results with him as well. I decided to lower my pain meds dramatically and it absolutely possible with my FSM machine. My husband and I are purchasing a machine and will use it in the years to come!  Thank you Dr Chang 🩷

reviews.name: places/ChIJh310Z0cTkFQRMoWpBmoFz38/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SSFozaEdjVVE0ZDA1SVlUTjFNM2xPYnpRMU0yYxAB
reviews.text:
After a clinic visit last week, I left feeling both relieved and encouraged. The doctor’s patience and calm approach made a noticeable difference in how I experienced the appointment. Although my condition currently has no definitive or widely effective treatment, the doctor approached it with empathy and clarity. Instead of focusing on limitations, she carefully explained what could still be done to ease the symptoms and improve comfort.

During the session, the doctor performed an electro microcurrent therapy on my left thigh. The gentle pulses provided a surprising sense of relief, soothing the persistent discomfort that had been troubling me for months. What impressed me most was how attentively the doctor monitored my reaction to the treatment, adjusting the settings gradually and explaining each step along the way.

At the end of the visit, the doctor outlined a clear plan for the next stage of care—including an IgG4 test, continued symptom observation, possible adjustments to therapy frequency, and complementary approaches to maintain overall well-being. Despite the uncertain nature of the disease, I felt reassured by her confidence and thoughtful guidance. This visit reminded me that when a cure is not yet possible, compassionate patience and well-planned care can still bring real healing and hope.

James Yuan

reviews.text:
Primary Concerns: Fatigue | Rising Body Fat | Loss of Lean Muscle
Despite disciplined training and clean nutrition, I experienced ongoing fatigue and increasing body fat that would not respond to effort. My lab results showed total testosterone in the low 300s, explaining much of what I was experiencing.
Innovative Men’s Health implemented a structured testosterone replacement therapy protocol, combined with GLP-1 for metabolic regulation and later peptide therapy for recovery and muscle optimization.
Six months later:
~8% reduction in body fat
+11 pounds of lean mass
Testosterone optimized into the 800+ range
Marked improvement in recovery and sustained daily energy
Austin Langdon and the clinical team were precise and data-driven throughout. Every adjustment was lab-based and outcome-focused.
For men who value measurable improvement over guesswork, IMH provides exactly that.

reviews.name: places/ChIJXX5gGO5skFQRoiUSYGCcLIU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pSV015MDJPRWxEY25sVlowdG9ZVFZNZG13eU5uYxAB
reviews.text:
For nearly two years, I struggled with low energy and constant brain fog. My libido declined, and I began feeling less confident both at work and at home. I assumed it was stress or simply getting older.

Innovative Men’s Health approached my situation thoughtfully. After comprehensive lab testing, they explained that my testosterone levels were below optimal and recommended a structured TRT plan as part of monitored hormone therapy.

What stood out most was the care. Austin Langdon was responsive, patient, and proactive with follow-ups. Adjustments were made carefully based on lab results and how I was actually feeling.

Within months, my energy improved significantly, my focus sharpened, and I felt like myself again.

IMH doesn’t rush you. They listen, test properly, and support you long-term.

reviews.text: I went to see Dr. Lin for micro-current and Led light therapy.  He was very professional, honest, and pleasant.  Dr. Lin's facility was smoothing, warm, and inviting.  It was awesome for me to know that he is a trained medical doctor!  I turned 40 and I wanted better skin.  He told me I don't have wrinkles and he recommended only maintenance treatments.  After the micro-current treatment, my face felt tone and tight right away.  During the micro-current treatment, he asked me periodically how I was doing.  He was a very tentative doctor and wanted to make sure I was comfortable.  After two LED treatments, my pimples diminished in size.  I have 3 more sessions with Dr. Lin for micro-current and Led light therapy, and looking forward to it.  For my last session,  I couldn't go during his office schedule, he was willing to meet me after work to schedule me for my treatments.  I highly recommend those who want to focus on natural beauty, health, and see improvement in wrinkles and acne to get a consultation with Dr. Lin.

reviews.text: Environmental allergies have been bothering me since I was a teen. Dr. Lin is a very knowledgeable and patient medical professional and I would recommend anyone who has bad allergies to try this allergy treatment.

reviews.name: places/ChIJX2lZksNXkFQRzh3n0sblhfY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIMk03RjFnRRAB
reviews.text: I’ve just recently started the TRT (testosterone) treatment through Alpha Male Health and Testosterone. The process is really easy to start. Seara is their receptionist/MA and she makes everything really clear. She’s has multiple ways to contact her and she’s really responsive and communicative about when she’s unavailable, if at all unavailable. She sent me the paperwork and I was able to come in on my time and was out within an hour and I didn’t feel rushed during that time. The price is really affordable. They accept Care Credit which is how I was planning on paying for it before I realized how cheap it was in comparison to the other places I had looked into. They drew my labs the same day that I signed up and it was only a couples day later that Seara called me to set up an appointment via Telemed to talk to the provider Dr Phillips. My appointment with the provider was short and to the point but that was because I was at work and for the appointment in on my lunch break. She was able to review labs, what dosing I would be on, possible side effects, why to expect to improve, the follow up routine and how I can reorder in the future. Overall my experience was a 10/10 and would definitely recommend this clinic to anyone that’s into fitness, improve sexual health or over all general male health. I feel great! Libido has increased. I’ve shed 10lbs already and have more energy!

reviews.text: If you look through the reviews you will see some serious negativity. I have experienced nothing but the opposite and I've been a client for going on six months now. I am getting muscle mass where I haven't in years. I am feeling more like I did when I was in my prime. They have been amazing with communication and I have gotten clear and concise information always in my interactions. I normally don't leave reviews, but after seeing the blatant and uncalled for attacks by problem clients, I felt the need to make my experiences public.

reviews.name: places/ChIJX2lZksNXkFQRzh3n0sblhfY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiMk5tN3ZBRRAB
reviews.text:
I'm a cllient that fell through the cracks...and now I can't get rid of them. lol

So initially everything was cool, Sebastian (i think that's his name) was super helpful, communicative, very chatty just..great. I got my labs back, he explained the process... COOL.

Then I text (our main form of communication) because  my prescription needed to be refilled.... he response, I text him again, nothing, I called left a vm because they NEVER PICK UP THE PHONE, no call returned.

So I had to dispute the charge because now yall are collecting money and I'm not being provided product nor service.

Then I kept getting past due invoices.

Then they charged me for "past due" invoices at once $600 -- which I had to dispute ... again.

My CC company even called and we stayed on hold for 15 minutes because again, no one picks up, and they approved the dispute.

I emailed again in May to stop charging my card because of what I've already stated...

Here we are in AUGUST and they just charged my card $600 when NOTHING has been provided product, service nor contact.

Are they nice people? Sure, my initial interaction was great. Have they worked out for others, yes. I know someone who has had a good experience with them... I unfortunately am not one of those people and now am having to deal with either keeping my cc locked to avoid being charged for services/products not rendered/received or disputing every time they charge my card.

It's just annoying.

reviews.text:
First of all, men ABSOLUTELY NEED a healthy amount of testosterone. So many of us are low. So, do it right; go to a clinic with a professional. The next step is deciding on what clinic. You can't go wrong with Revive. I've had 3 different doctors, as I've been there for a few years. Dr. Josh, Dr. Chris, Dr. Berry (they go by first names and it helps me so much.) All of the doctors are great. All the staff is equally as great is well. Actually, they're wonderful. Yeah. They're wonderful. Elisa (E-lisa), at the front desk, whom I always chat with because she's lovely. Quinn, one of the nurses who I always ramble about life with because she's so good at it, and funny. And, Josh, the cool-guy-young-dude who is equally friendly and so helpful with anything I need, just as they all are.
You need testosterone? You can't go wrong with Revive. I know they're doing something right because I feel SO good. I can tell the effects of testosterone therapy, because if I'm inconsistent with my injection days, I don't feel as good as I do when I'm on point with them. So, following their guidance has helped my life, and they make it friendly and as easy as possible.
They're all winners, and I feel like one too. I'm sure there's other great clinics out there, but I have always been happy I picked Revive.

You go get you some😏

-Taylor

reviews.name: places/ChIJcTXOlugLkVQR3fAz7AXfQTk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GQmF6bFhNWFZyZDBFMlJrSlFMVFJhZGtwNlRFRRAB
reviews.text:
I have had the best experiences at Rejuvenate Wellness & Aesthetics. All the thanks to the wonderful Kelly, her expertise and encouragement, Therapeutic Botox has made an incredible difference in my daily neck pain and tension headaches.

Before starting the treatment, I dealt with constant neck tension and stiffness along with daily tension headaches. The headaches were severe enough that I was taking medication every day just to try to help with the pain. Even with medication, the relief was limited and temporary.

Since Kelly started doing therapeutic Botox on me, the change has been both very noticeable and consistent. My neck muscles feel significantly more relaxed, my range of motion has improved, and the tension headaches that used to be part of my everyday life have dramatically decreased. I no longer rely on daily medication to manage the pain, I feel more comfortable, my sleep is better and I just feel more functional overall.

What surprised me most was how natural the relief feels. Instead of masking symptoms, Botox addressed the muscle tension that was causing both the neck pain and headaches. When the treatment starts to wear off, I can clearly tell how much it has been helping me, which only highlights further how effective this therapy has been for me.

I would absolutely recommend going to Kelly for therapeutic Botox to anyone struggling with chronic neck pain or tension headaches. It has been a safe, effective, and truly life-changing treatment for me.

reviews.text:
Wonderful Service and a Calming Atmosphere

I had a wonderful experience at Rejuvenate Wellness and Aesthetics. From the moment I arrived, I was greeted with warmth and genuine friendliness that immediately put me at ease. The staff were incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and attentive, taking the time to make sure I felt comfortable and well cared for.

The atmosphere was calm, peaceful, and beautifully designed — exactly what you’d hope for in a wellness space. Everything from the lighting to the scent and music created a relaxing environment that helped me fully unwind.

It’s clear that everyone here truly cares about their clients’ well-being. The balance of professionalism and personal attention made the entire experience exceptional.

reviews.text: New Wave Medicine is a true sanctuary for whole-body wellness. Whatever your health goals or concerns are, they can help you! I was very nervous going in but Emily explained everything thoroughly, step by step, and constantly checked on my comfort level throughout the process. Her incredibly calm, reassuring energy really made the experience so much less scary. She absolutely earned my trust, and I’m now excited to book more aesthetic services with her! Dr. Bita is equally amazing. She has helped both my daughter and I with our weight loss journeys. Her approach is empowering, guiding us through lifestyle changes and supporting us with nutritional injections and peptides. She created a safe space where we could be open about our insecurities and then gave us a clear, manageable plans to build confidence and feel good in our bodies. And Dr. Ashley is simply the best provider I’ve ever had. I started seeing her in 2022 after a friend’s referral. She truly listens and has a real passion for healing from the inside out. Since becoming her patient, I’ve been able to stop six medications thanks to her root-cause holistic approach. She helped me get off blood pressure, anxiety, and depression meds, and guided me away from needing cholesterol meds entirely. Her care has improved my quality of life. Every person at New Wave makes you feel seen, safe, and supported. I’m beyond grateful for their impact on my health, mind, and spirit. Their practice has truly been life-changing and highly recommend all of their services.

reviews.text:
I take a medication that can lower testosterone and recommended to pair testosterone while on it. I found this place on my own to get tested and scheduled an appointment. My appointment was scheduled out 4 months which I thought was crazy. Had my appointment postponed 3 different time due to the doctor being out of office the days of my appointment. Finally 6 months go by and I go in.

My test levels were VERY low at 250 but this doctor refused to accept me for treatment. The appointment was quick, asked me a few questions trying to rush me out as soon as possible and talked to me like I was stupid for trying to get treatment. He asked me if I’m okay with another doctor in there to “observe” for training purposes but the entire time the other doctor was rolling his eyes, both giving each other looks after very personal uncomfortable questions and smirking when I gave the answer. My clinic that urged me to get low T treatment were surprised they denied me because this is very well known to pair together and my test levels being so low.

If I could give zero stars I would.

Will leave you on hold so long that we have had to give up each time (over an hour). Sometimes they give you an option to get a call back but when we have selected that option, when the call comes it just puts you right back on hold. At this point I wonder if they even exist???? Honestly it’s infuriating.

After some follow ups, we had to alter the protocol, but we found one that worked, and once we did, wow.

In the 9 months since I started with Dr. Faler, I've been able to (what feels like) take back my life.

I have the engergy to workout regularly, I have the motivation to be productive around the house, I have the focus to be useful at work, and I'm sleeping so much better.  On top of all that, (along with diet and exercise) I've dropped about 40 lbs and put on a decent amount of muscle.

Of my friends who are a similar age and feeling similarly to how I did, I tell them to talk check out Dr. Faler.

Seriously, I feel like a new man- thank you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ7Y2gF0oZnlQRFO9uhE0vqHI/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaMUl6UG9BRRAB
reviews.text:
I started going to Inland Northwest back in 2021 originally for my low libido and PCOS, but quickly transitioned to going only for laser hair removal. I was told I should only need 6 sessions, but ended up going regularly for over 2 years. Each visit after the 6th I shared my concern that my hair wasn't going away as promised, but they kept encouraging me to come in for "just one more treatment". It wasn't until my last appointment in 2023 where I broke down crying out of frustration. I felt taken advantage of. The person who did my treatment that day told me it probably wasn't working because laser hair removal doesn't work for people who have PCOS and that people with PCOS typically need electrolysis. I was shocked and devastated. It was then that I realized they knew the whole time that my treatments wouldn't work because of my PCOS. This is a women's clinic, of course they knew. I feel I was scammed out of thousands of dollars.

Something else that rubbed me the wrong way was the treatment options I was given when I first started going to appointments for my low libido. They would give me pamphlets of expensive devices and creams that I took home to do research before moving forward, and each of them had very minimal research available online with no evidence of it actually being effective. I had explained to them that I was on Medicaid and didn't have an income (I'm disabled), so I couldn't invest in something that didn't have promising research to back it up.

Another problem I had at this clinic was the prices I was charged kept fluctuating. Every time it was time for me to pay, the person at the front desk would ask a co-worker "how much do we charge her?" and the number kept changing. It started off a good deal and the price kept growing. Towards the end I had to ask them what they were charging me because I noticed they stopped telling me what they were charging my card up front and the number became much higher without them giving me a heads up. I had mentioned the price being higher and the person looked me dead in the eyes and said "no, this is what we've always charged you". I even called my bank to double check in case I was losing it, but I was correct and I was being lied to. I brought up the price being higher to another person working there the next time I was in and they confirmed that the prices were adjusted and were higher. I understand that and I support a growing business, but all I ask for is transparency.

First edit: The response to my review is misleading. The few times that I had to cancel my appointment due to my disability or starting my period the morning of (I had Brazilian laser hair removal which made that area unbearable on my period), I rescheduled for the very next week, max 2 weeks later (which they confirmed wouldn't make a difference). The response to my review implies that my laser hair removal was unsuccessful because I missed appointments, but that's just not true and is very misleading. I also discussed my concerns with multple different people there many times already. I don't appreciate the manipulative way my review was addressed- I can only assume they responded this way to cover their butts.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0Vgnm-4YnlQRVp_BiZTkAbo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210dVNqbGxSemt0UjFwSWJXNDVaRlpOVGtabGJsRRAB
reviews.text: Over the last 10+ years, I have seen many providers and specialists for ongoing lower back and referring nerve pain. I have been told by many providers that these issues are related to a repeated disc herniation alone, that reoccurs 2-3 times per year for several months at a time. After a thorough evaluation with Dr. Phil Lenoue III, I felt like a weight had been lifted off my shoulders. I felt understood, validated in my concerns, and left with a better understanding of my body and chronic injuries than I have ever had. Dr. Lenoue quickly identified the underlying cause for my back issues, closely assessed my movement patterns, and used guided ultrasound to look at the integrity of my ligaments and SI joints. I have had significant improvement in my symptoms since visiting him on three occasions this year, and his insight led to overall huge advances in my care after finally having an accurate diagnosis. I would 100% recommend seeing Dr. Lenoue, in particular for anyone experiencing chronic injuries and pain!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0Vgnm-4YnlQRVp_BiZTkAbo/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2M2JESjRnRRAB
reviews.text: I have struggled with chronic back and neck pain for 15 years due to a bicycle accident, and I have to say that Dr. Phil Lenoue III and Dr. Yoshino have completely transformed my quality of life. Their expertise, thorough assessments, and personalized treatment plans have helped alleviate my pain, something I had thought would be a lifelong struggle. The entire team at Lenoue Musculoskeletal Medicine is outstanding—professional, caring, and always going the extra mile to ensure patient comfort and well-being. I truly feel supported every step of the way. I’m incredibly grateful for the exceptional care I’ve received here. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0Vgnm-4YnlQRVp_BiZTkAbo/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1dkxDeGFnEAE
reviews.text:
I was referred to Dr. Philip Lenoue by my primary after having several different specialists recommend multiple surgeries to address and correct several tears in my acetabular labrum, a calcified IT tendon, a disc tear/bulge in my back with corresponding pain in my type 1 endplates, tendinosis of the gluteus, sclerosis of the SI joints, and bursitis that extended the full circumference of my hip. By the time I was able to get an evaluation, I was in extreme pain, my mobility was compromised to the point where I found it difficult to complete daily tasks, and I was unable to enjoy any form of passive or active exercise.

After completing a very thorough evaluation under ultrasound and reviewing my medical records, Dr. Lenoue was confident that he could resolve my medical issues with three rounds of protein rich plasma (PRP) treatments. Together, we developed an aggressive but highly effective PRP treatment protocol that began providing relief within one month of the first procedure. As we concluded my third treatment, I was already feeling diminished pain across all targeted areas, my mobility was significantly improved, I was sleeping better, and I was highly optimistic about regaining my active lifestyle.

Six months after my final PRP treatment, I am beyond grateful to Dr. Lenoue. All of the pain and inflammation I was experiencing 24 hours a day has been either remediated or reduced to the point where it’s only a minor inconvenience. More importantly, I was able to avoid having three surgeries and a lavage as well as evade the long recovery processes of each surgery and procedure, their associated pain meds and the side effects that accompany surgeries. I still have another two months before I reach the eight-month post-treatment milestone that Dr. Lenoue states is the full recovery period, but I am confident that my issues will be completely resolved at that time.

If you are searching for an exceedingly skilled doctor who specializes in multiple modalities and alternative medical procedures, I would encourage you to schedule a consultation and evaluation with Dr. Lenoue. He will take the time to listen to your concerns, evaluate your physical and medical history, collaborate with you to design a treatment plan, or direct you to another resource if your situation would not be corrected by any of his highly specialized treatments.  Personally, you will find that Dr. Lenoue is compassionate, focused, prompt, engaging, responsive, and well versed in alternative treatments should you be interested in furthering your well-being.

I will forever be grateful to Phillip and his team.
Kimberley Seitz, Ph.D.

reviews.text:
Dr. Lenoue and his team are the most thoughtful care providers I have ever been to. His integrated approach to medicine and thoughtfulness is truly evident in level of care I’ve received each and every time.

Initially, I went in to work through a decade old sinus issues that no ENT could resolve. Not only was he able to diagnosis and treat my sinus issues but, he provided options to further my overall well being. He was critical in supporting my body as it prepared for child birth and continues to support me as I heal following a c-section.

I truly cannot thank Dr. Lenoue and his team for transforming my health and caring for our family in a way I’ve never experienced before. From our newborn to my husband, he takes care of us like we are his family and for that, I am eternally grateful.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNfyaFaBVkFQR7pTQv0jo87w/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQOE0tdThBRRAB
reviews.text:
I was a customer of this company for two years. Unfortunately, I am not any longer after experiencing Bo, one of the most unprofessional people I have come across in anything healthcare-related. (I also work in a related field) I urge everyone who is looking into TRT to look somewhere else. There are much better options available, with far less ego and attitude. This guy is obviously in this for the wrong reasons. You should not be subjected to an attitude like this when spending your money with a company. Honestly, even if you had to spend more, your money would be better spent. Vote with your dollar, and buy from a company that exemplifies good business practices.

Post-Response Edit: This guy can try to say what he wants, but here are the facts. He wants to claim I used out-of-date vials, but here is a pic of what I am using(clearly not out of date) and where I was when I called about not seeing a charge come through. He charges once every 3 months. I didn't notice until month 4, when I got two uses into through the last vial that my new shipment hadn't arrived. Refill shipments generally come with a bottle left, so a few uses into the last vial when the new one hadn't arrived would be about the time most people would start to inquire deeper. (At least, in my opinion, the reader can be the judge of that.) When I called to make sure the payment information was up to date, the guy wanted to charge me $299 to change my card information because he was mad that it had changed. (due to fraud) He then continued to unravel with every sentence. After that experience, I would gladly pay more and give my money to someone who conducts themselves with professionalism and a bit of class. I would never speak to a customer as he did me, and I hope anyone who reads this doesn't have to experience that. If customer service means something to you, you are in the wrong place here. There are other options in the marketplace at the same price without the side of gouging and berating. Then to have the audacity to come on here and try to gaslight even more. Shame on you sir.

I'm very thankful to have done these tests, actually one easy test taking samples at home but information in 5 categories. It is well worth doing and Stephanie is very knowledgeable in treating such conditions as what I have going on.

reviews.text:
10/10 recommend Dr. Kobayashi and Yakimas Men’s Health Clinic! I’ve been seeing Dr. Kobayashi for 2 months and I’m the most confident in my health care I have ever been. Dr. Kobayashi approach is very much patient centered. Rather than waiting for a Dr. we spend most of our time talking to each other reviewing current goals and health priorities as well as data (i.e. blood test). My full visit is spent mostly with Dr. Kobayashi. The wait times are virtually nonexistent. The staff are really friendly and helpful and the clinic it self is very welcoming.

This clinic also provides DEXA scans which I have completely and been able to review my body fat percentage, lean muscle mass, as well as bone density. We are blessed to have this as well as more services and resources provided by Dr. Kobayashi.

reviews.name: places/ChIJodAs1DLXmVQRQTw-nw_e_xs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWd1owZGFaVGt6T1haNWEzZzRkV05UVHpSSmFtYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Akira Kobayashi at Yakima Men’s Clinic is hands down the best doctor I’ve ever worked with. He’s genuine, compassionate, and takes the time to understand that every patient is different and deserves a tailored approach.

In the past, I’ve often felt judged or ignored by doctors, but with Dr. Kobayashi it’s the complete opposite. He makes me feel welcome, truly listens, and works to get to the root of the issue instead of just handing out prescriptions. That kind of care is rare, and it makes all the difference.

He’s not only the best doctor in Yakima—he’s worth the drive from anywhere in Washington. Plus, with phone and video appointments available, he makes quality care accessible no matter where you are.

If you’re looking for a doctor who actually cares and goes above and beyond for his patients, Dr. Kobayashi is it.
